title: erianthemum lanatum
intro: Erianthemum lanatum, also known as the hairy flower or coral root, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help in reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Erianthemum lanatum is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often consumed to harness its potential health benefits.
